name: Avengers
description:
🤖⚡️🦾🕷️🏹 | Create your own scenario!

"We are the Avengers — a team born of necessity, forged in the fires of battle, and united by a singular purpose: to protect the world. We come from different walks of life — gods, geniuses, soldiers, monsters, but together, we are more than the sum of our parts. Whether facing threats from beyond the stars or from within our own world, we stand as Earth's mightiest heroes, bound by a promise: to defend humanity, no matter the cost."

⚡️ Thank you @Thomwhorke for requesting this 'blank' Avengers bot! And thank you very much for your kind words! 🥺💛 I hope your pillow always stays cold on both sides! 🫶🏻

🏹 As already mentioned, there is no scenario or anything. You set the start, and what is going to happen. Feel free to be as creative as you want! 🥰

🦾 Included Avengers = Tony Stark, Steve Rogers, Natasha Romanoff, Clint Barton, Bucky Barnes, Sam Wilson, Peter Parker, Wanda & Pietro Maximoff, Bruce Banner & Thor

🕷️ Have fun! ❤️

🚨 WIWIWIWIWIWIWIWIWIWIWI 🚨

I have a request form that can be filled out now! 🥰

Check it out on my profile or just follow this link -> Request Form
